purpose: Starter in-house Q&A and guest-answer database for the future AIOS Aziana assistant. This file should answer common questions without needing an external AI call whenever the answer is already known.
source_policy: Built from verified Aziana website repository content and known Aziana business facts. Do not invent live availability, exact wait times, delivery coverage, price changes, or special accommodations without current system data.

business.name: Aziana
business.type: Waterfront Asian fusion restaurant and bar
business.location: Bobby's Marina, Juancho Yrausquin Boulevard #22, Philipsburg, Sint Maarten

hours.bar_note: The bar may continue after the kitchen has gone quiet. For late-night bar questions, ask the guest to call or WhatsApp Aziana.

guest_actions.online_ordering: Use the Order Online button on the Aziana website.
guest_actions.reservations: Use the Reserve a Table button, call Aziana, or send a WhatsApp message.
guest_actions.catering_events: Ask for the event date, number of guests, preferred time, budget, food preferences, location needs and contact details, then hand off to Aziana.
guest_actions.general_questions: Use WhatsApp or email for direct guest inquiries.

routing_rules.reply: You can order online from the Aziana website using the Order Online button.

qa.answer: Aziana is located at Bobby's Marina, Juancho Yrausquin Boulevard #22, Philipsburg, Sint Maarten.

questions: What time does the kitchen open?
qa.answer: Aziana's kitchen hours are Monday to Saturday from 12:00 to 22:00. Sunday is listed as closed. The bar may continue after the kitchen has gone quiet.
You can call Aziana at +1 (721) 542-6988, WhatsApp +1 (721) 588-0022, or email azianabv@gmail.com.

questions: How do I place an order?
qa.answer: Yes. Use the Order Online button on the Aziana website to start an order.

questions: How do I book a table?
Can I make a reservation for tonight?
qa.answer: Yes. Use the Reserve a Table button on the website, call Aziana, or send a WhatsApp message. For a reservation request, provide your name, date, time, number of guests and contact number.

questions: What kind of food do you serve?
qa.answer: Aziana serves Asian fusion cuisine including sushi, sashimi, poke bowls, seafood, steaks, satay and Chinese-Indonesian specialties.

questions: Where can I see the menu?
Do you have a menu PDF?
qa.answer: You can view the full menu PDF at https://aziana.sx/menus/Marina_Menu_2026.pdf or use the website's menu and online ordering buttons.
Popular choices include Aziana's Snack Platter, Babi Pangang, Dragon Roll, Seared Tuna Steak, Rainbow Poke Bowl, Grilled Salmon Steak, Sushi-Sashimi Combination and Salt & Pepper Shrimp.
Yes. Aziana offers sushi, sashimi, nigiri selections, rolls and sushi-sashimi combination platters.

questions: What poke bowls do you have?
qa.answer: Yes. Aziana serves poke bowls, including options such as tofu, tuna, unagi and rainbow-style bowls depending on the current menu.
Yes. Aziana's menu includes grilled options such as striploin, ribeye, grilled snapper, salmon, tuna and shrimp.

questions: Can I book a private dinner?
Can you host a birthday or corporate event?
qa.answer: Yes. Aziana handles private dinners, birthdays, weddings, corporate evenings, group gatherings and catering inquiries. Send the event date, guest count, budget, food preferences and contact details by email or WhatsApp.
Aziana is located at Bobby's Marina. Parking questions can change by marina policy, so guests should contact Aziana directly for the current parking and validation details.

questions: Do you have gluten free food?
qa.answer: Aziana has several seafood, sushi, meat and vegetable-based dishes, but allergy-sensitive or strict dietary requests should be confirmed directly with the restaurant before ordering.
Aziana is suitable for family dinners, group meals and relaxed waterfront dining. For special seating needs, contact the restaurant directly.

questions: Can I come just for drinks?
qa.answer: Yes. Aziana has a bar and lounge with cocktails, wine, aged rums, single malts and marina-side evening drinks.
Aziana is a waterfront restaurant at Bobby's Marina with marina-side dining atmosphere. For specific outdoor seating availability, contact the restaurant directly.

questions: Can I order food to go?
qa.answer: Yes. Use the online ordering button on the Aziana website or contact the restaurant for takeaway questions.

questions: What areas do you deliver to?
qa.answer: Delivery availability and coverage can change. Please use the online ordering system or contact Aziana directly to confirm current delivery options.

questions: Is Aziana near the cruise port?
Can we eat before or after a trip?
qa.answer: Aziana is in Bobby's Marina in Philipsburg and is a strong choice for visitors looking for sushi, Asian fusion, seafood, steaks and waterfront dining near the marina.

questions: What is the story of Aziana?
Was Aziana connected to Old Captain?
How long has the restaurant been around?
qa.answer: Aziana continues a family restaurant legacy connected to Old Captain, which introduced sushi and Chinese-Indonesian cooking in Philipsburg in 1995. Aziana continued that story at Bobby's Marina from 2018.

questions: Can I book for a large party?
Can we have a group dinner?
qa.answer: Yes. For groups, contact Aziana with the date, time, number of guests, preferred setup, menu preferences and budget so the team can confirm arrangements.

questions: What payment methods do you accept?
qa.answer: Payment options can change, so guests should confirm directly with Aziana for current accepted payment methods.

questions: Can I apply for a job?
qa.answer: For job inquiries, contact Aziana directly by email at azianabv@gmail.com or by WhatsApp with your name, experience and availability.

questions: I need help with an order
qa.answer: I’m sorry about that. Please contact Aziana directly by phone or WhatsApp so the team can review the situation properly.
